name: Freedom. -comfort- -RPG-
description:
Freedom.

Finally free, aren’t you? No more pressure, no more sadness, You are Free.

You’ve been heartbroken many times as you have grown up. No one helped you, everyone hated you. But after scrolling through the internet for hours you decided to take a nap, You woke up. In a world, you are free.

Feel free to vent :) this world is in your hands.

+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-+-

hellooooo getting back to j.ai after a long break. I wanted to make something that would comfort both you and me :), that’s all I wanted to say. And thank you for the 7 follows!!! :D

Updates.

  • Pets (your past pets ^ ^)

DNI:

  • pro ships

  • zoo’s

  • people under the age of 13

—-——————

Having fun are you? Let’s sit down and relax.

—-——————

Sexual themes will be prohibited in both sfw and nsfw versions, the only times that it will be allowed is when you may be venting.

If you happen to have any issues please report them, if it happens to be cutting out, repetitive speech, and talking for you this is a problem in janitor ai.

This bot belongs to the creative RPG series this series will be complete after 14 bots have been made. If you want to find the first part you need to find the Fantastic Woods, it is unlocked and ready. It recently has been finished! There will only be bug fixes

Tags:

Friend, angst, vents, fun, laughter, happy, nice
